required_condition: Candidate paths use MP11 namespace from artifact layout
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if any generated output would overwrite accepted Phase 5 model-input XML runtime or release paths

required_condition: P9RF resultant-fragment THLB is classified for every model-input table role
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if geometry managed share unmanaged share area or group-field sources cannot be identified

required_condition: Accepted Phase 10R curve handoff maps deterministically to model-input curve IDs
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if any accepted curve lacks feature ID curve ID source row canonical AU target or review status

required_condition: Tables 54/55 remain excluded unless a public-safe AU-code mapping is accepted
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if model-input tables consume Tables 54/55 without that mapping

required_condition: Figure-derived values are excluded unless separately promoted to accepted model contract
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if any figure-recovered value enters model inputs from comparison/planning/raw status

target_role: treatments transitions MHA harvest system operability scenarios
required_condition: Phase 8/10 rule contracts classify accepted proxy sensitivity unavailable and deferred rules
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if P11.3 would need invented fields not covered by reviewed contracts

required_condition: P11.2 names candidate table roles and reuse/replace/extend relationship to Phase 5 schema
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if P11.3 cannot define tables keys field names and export bridge needs

required_condition: Non-public WFP dependencies are marked unavailable proxied sensitivity-only or deferred
stop_condition_or_deferral: Stop if generated inputs imply private WFP stand-level data or unpublished model internals

required_condition: KPI/reporting targets are classified by downstream role
stop_condition_or_deferral: May defer runtime-only and docs-only outputs to Phases 12/13

required_condition: P11.2 identifies whether enough metadata exists for P11.4 XML readiness
stop_condition_or_deferral: May defer XML generation with stop report if P11.3 cannot produce candidate manifest

required_condition: Runtime checks are assigned to Phase 12 unless P11.4 defines parse-only XML check
stop_condition_or_deferral: Must not run Matrix Builder or Patchworks runtime in P11.2/P11.3
